messages.content: save all the chat above till top as knowledge in git

Automation modules session — Giving, Data Studio, Sign-up Flow Builder (full chat summary):

PROJECT SETUP:
- Playwright automation bot; test cases from Excel: test-cases/RegressionTest Cases - All Modules.xlsx
- Shared memory repo: aravind936/playwright-bot-memory (GITHUB_REPO without leading slash)
- Login via tests/helpers/sadmin-login.ts loginAsUser(page); credentials from config.json (admin/admin on dev-09)
- playwright.config.ts: headless false, slowMo 500, test timeout 240s
- Serial suites use shared ctx object; run individual tests with -g "TC_XXX"

GIVING MODULE (TC_GV_001–070):
- tests/helpers/giving.ts, tests/giving/giving-first-70.spec.ts
- npm run test:giving-first70
- fillCampaignDates() fixed for Ant date picker scoping

DATA STUDIO (TC_DS_01–59):
- tests/helpers/data-studio.ts, tests/data-studio/data-studio-all.spec.ts
- npm run test:data-studio-all
- All 59 Excel rows marked Automated
- Key fixes: search verifies input value + first result (no search_text= in URL); pagination uses .ant-pagination-item-2;
  Is Deceased Yes/No uses combobox not clickable text; City "is any of" options are menuitem not .ant-select-item-option;
  SAVE FILTERS hidden until filter/column changeState; saved filter rename/delete via hover row → hover .handlebar-icon three-dot menu;
  use .views-list-container .view-item not .view-container; TC_DS_24 opens saved filter only (no create); TC_DS_19 self-contained two filters

SIGN-UP FLOW BUILDER (TC_SB_001–125):
- tests/helpers/signup-builder.ts, tests/signup-builder/signup-builder-all.spec.ts
- npm run test:signup-builder-all
- Builder path: /admin/signup-builder/; API waits for /api/v1/signup/steps/, publish, fields, structure, layout
- ~72 runnable, ~53 skipped, ~34 partial annotations in spec
- Frontend builder source in almareact submodule (not always in workspace); tests use #root + role/text locators

TC_SB_001 — SITE SETTINGS ENABLE NEW SIGNUP PAGE (implemented & passing):
- Route: /admin/site-settings (dev-09: https://dev-09.almabase-beta.com/admin/site-settings)
- Search placeholder "Search here ?"; must press Enter after fill — fill() alone does not trigger filter (onSearch/debounced keyup)
- Click result in #search-tab-results .search-tab-field-label → switches to Custom Features tab and scrolls to field
- Toggle label: "Enable new signup page"; field key custom_features.enable_new_signup.enabled → DOM id custom_features__enable_new_signup__enabled
- Ant Design 3 switch: use class ant-switch-checked (not aria-checked)
- Save: click Save in .ant-tabs-tabpane-active #site-settings-buttons (duplicate IDs per tab — do NOT use first #site-settings-buttons)
- Confirm modal "Do you want to update these fields ?" → Proceed; POST /_update_site_settings_data/
- fixCustomFeaturesValidationErrors: jobs deadline spinbutton may be NaN — set to 28 via getByRole('spinbutton', { name: /Auto hide jobs/i })
- Save only when toggle was changed (idempotent if already ON)
- Super-admin required for this field (access_level SUPER_ADMIN in backend constants)

HELPERS ADDED (signup-builder.ts):
- openSiteSettings, searchSiteSettings, enableNewSignupToggleIfOff, saveSiteSettings, fixCustomFeaturesValidationErrors
- NEW_SIGNUP_TOGGLE_ID = custom_features__enable_new_signup__enabled

GENERAL PATTERNS:
- Escape closes Ant drawers; click outside to dismiss selects
- Do not run full signup-builder suite unless user asks — user runs manually and reports failures
- Excel automation path column updated to point at spec files per module
Correction saved: "Site Settings search: fill query then press Enter — Ant Design Search onSearch only fires on Enter/search icon, not on fill()." (context: Site Settings — searchSiteSettings)

Correction saved: "Enable new signup page toggle: use #custom_features__enable_new_signup__enabled and assert ant-switch-checked class; Ant Design 3 switches do not set aria-checked reliably." (context: Site Settings — TC_SB_001 toggle)
Correction saved: "Site Settings Save button: scope to .ant-tabs-tabpane-active #site-settings-buttons — each tab duplicates id site-settings-buttons." (context: Site Settings — saveSiteSettings)

Correction saved: "Custom Features tab may have NaN in jobs deadline spinbutton blocking Save — fix to 28 before save via getByRole('spinbutton', { name: /Auto hide jobs/i })." (context: Site Settings — fixCustomFeaturesValidationErrors)
Correction saved: "Data Studio search does not add search_text= to URL; verify search input value and first result name instead." (context: Data Studio — TC_DS_09)
Correction saved: "Data Studio pagination: use .ant-pagination-item-2; use findSearchQueryForPagination() with broad search terms." (context: Data Studio — TC_DS_10)
Correction saved: "Data Studio Yes/No filters (e.g. Is Deceased): select 'is' radio then use Ant combobox for Yes/No, not clickable text." (context: Data Studio — applyYesNoFilter)
